Subí apoyando un pie completo sobre el cajón y empujá con ese talón.
Elevá el cuerpo hasta extender la pierna arriba.
Bajá con control y alterná las piernas.
es.name: Subida al Cajón con Mancuernas

instructions: Stand facing a box or bench with a dumbbell in each hand.
Step up, planting your whole foot on the box and driving through that heel.
Rise until your leg is extended at the top.
Step down with control and alternate legs.
en.name: Dumbbell Step Up

name: Frog Jumps
instructions: Parate con los pies un poco más anchos que los hombros.
Bajá en cuclillas profundas tocando el piso con las manos.
Saltá con explosividad extendiendo el cuerpo.
Caé suave en cuclillas y encadená el siguiente salto.
Parate con los pies un poco más anchos que los hombros.
Bajá en cuclillas profundas tocando el piso con las manos.
Saltá con explosividad extendiendo el cuerpo.
Caé suave en cuclillas y encadená el siguiente salto.
es.name: Saltos de Rana

instructions: Stand with feet slightly wider than your shoulders.
Lower into a deep squat, touching the floor with your hands.
Jump explosively, extending your body.
Land softly in a squat and chain the next jump.
en.name: Frog Jumps

name: Front Squat
instructions: Apoyá la barra en la parte frontal de los hombros con los codos altos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Apoyá la barra en la parte frontal de los hombros con los codos altos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Frontal

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring your arms up under the bar while keeping the elbows high and the upper arm slightly above parallel to the floor. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross your arms while grasping the bar for total control.
Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly with the middle of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Front Squat

name: Full Squat
instructions: Parate con la barra en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla profunda manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé por debajo del paralelo con control.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con la barra en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla profunda manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé por debajo del paralelo con control.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Profunda

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just above shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder-width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and sitting back with your hips as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until your hamstrings are on your calves. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel or middle of your foot as you straighten the legs and extend the hips to go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Full Squat

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Sostené una mancuerna o pesa contra el pecho con ambas manos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido y los codos entre las rodillas.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Sostené una mancuerna o pesa contra el pecho con ambas manos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido y los codos entre las rodillas.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Goblet

instructions: Stand holding a light kettlebell by the horns close to your chest. This will be your starting position.
Squat down between your legs until your hamstrings are on your calves. Keep your chest and head up and your back straight.
At the bottom position, pause and use your elbows to push your knees out. Return to the starting position, and repeat for 10-20 repetitions.
en.name: Goblet Squat

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Ubicate en la máquina hack con la espalda apoyada y los pies en la plataforma.
Bajá flexionando las rodillas manteniendo la espalda apoyada.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Ubicate en la máquina hack con la espalda apoyada y los pies en la plataforma.
Bajá flexionando las rodillas manteniendo la espalda apoyada.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Hack

instructions: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.
Position your legs in the platform using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).

Now straighten your legs without locking the knees. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Hack Squat

name: Hack Squat (Machine)
instructions: Ubicate en la máquina hack con los hombros bajo los apoyos y los pies en la plataforma.
Liberá el seguro y bajá flexionando las rodillas.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Ubicate en la máquina hack con los hombros bajo los apoyos y los pies en la plataforma.
Liberá el seguro y bajá flexionando las rodillas.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Hack (Máquina)

instructions: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.
Position your legs in the platform using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).

Now straighten your legs without locking the knees. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Hack Squat (Machine)

name: Jump Squat
instructions: Parate con los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla y saltá con explosividad extendiendo el cuerpo.
Caé suave flexionando las rodillas.
Encadená la siguiente repetición con control.
Parate con los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla y saltá con explosividad extendiendo el cuerpo.
Caé suave flexionando las rodillas.
Encadená la siguiente repetición con control.
es.name: Sentadilla con Salto

instructions: Position a lightly loaded barbell across the back of your shoulders. You could also use a weighted vest, sandbag, or other type of resistance for this exercise.
The weight should be light enough that it doesn't slow you down significantly. Your feet should be just outside of shoulder width with your head and chest up. This will be your starting position.

Using a countermovement, squat partially down and immediately reverse your direction to explode off of the ground, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles. Maintain good posture throughout the jump.
As you return to the ground, absorb the impact through your legs.
en.name: Jump Squat

name: Jumping Lunge
instructions: Ubicate en posición de zancada con una pierna adelante y otra atrás.
Bajá flexionando ambas rodillas y saltá con explosividad.
En el aire intercambiá la posición de las piernas.
Caé suave en la zancada opuesta y encadená el siguiente salto.
Ubicate en posición de zancada con una pierna adelante y otra atrás.
Bajá flexionando ambas rodillas y saltá con explosividad.
En el aire intercambiá la posición de las piernas.
Caé suave en la zancada opuesta y encadená el siguiente salto.
es.name: Zancada con Salto

instructions: Get into a lunge with one leg forward and one back.
Lower by bending both knees and jump explosively.
In the air, switch the position of your legs.
Land softly in the opposite lunge and chain the next jump.
en.name: Jumping Lunge

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Sostené una pesa rusa contra el pecho con ambas manos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido y los codos entre las rodillas.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Sostené una pesa rusa contra el pecho con ambas manos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido y los codos entre las rodillas.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Goblet con Kettlebell

instructions: Stand holding a light kettlebell by the horns close to your chest. This will be your starting position.
Squat down between your legs until your hamstrings are on your calves. Keep your chest and head up and your back straight.
At the bottom position, pause and use your elbows to push your knees out. Return to the starting position, and repeat for 10-20 repetitions.
en.name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat

name: Lateral Box Jump
instructions: Parate de costado a un cajón con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Flexioná las rodillas y saltá lateralmente sobre el cajón.
Caé suave con las rodillas flexionadas.
Bajá con control y repetí.
Parate de costado a un cajón con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Flexioná las rodillas y saltá lateralmente sobre el cajón.
Caé suave con las rodillas flexionadas.
Bajá con control y repetí.
es.name: Salto Lateral al Cajón

instructions: Assume a comfortable standing position, with a short box positioned next to you. This will be your starting position.
Quickly dip into a quarter squat to initiate the stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to jump up and to the side.
Bring your knees high enough to ensure your feet have good clearance over the box.
Land on the center of the box, using your legs to absorb the impact.
Carefully jump down to the other side of the box, and continue going back and forth for several repetitions.
en.name: Lateral Box Jump

name: Lateral Lunge
instructions: Parate erguido con los pies juntos.
Dá un paso amplio hacia un costado flexionando esa rodilla.
Mantené la otra pierna extendida y el torso erguido.
Empujá para volver al centro y alterná los lados.
Parate erguido con los pies juntos.
Dá un paso amplio hacia un costado flexionando esa rodilla.
Mantené la otra pierna extendida y el torso erguido.
Empujá para volver al centro y alterná los lados.
es.name: Zancada Lateral

instructions: Stand tall with your feet together.
Take a wide step to one side, bending that knee.
Keep the other leg extended and your torso upright.
Push back to center and alternate sides.
en.name: Lateral Lunge

name: Lateral Squat
instructions: Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas al frente.
Desplazá el peso hacia un lado flexionando esa rodilla.
Mantené la otra pierna extendida y la espalda recta.
Empujá para volver al centro y alterná los lados.
Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas al frente.
Desplazá el peso hacia un lado flexionando esa rodilla.
Mantené la otra pierna extendida y la espalda recta.
Empujá para volver al centro y alterná los lados.
es.name: Sentadilla Lateral

instructions: Stand with feet wide apart and toes forward.
Shift your weight to one side, bending that knee.
Keep the other leg extended and your back straight.
Push back to center and alternate sides.
en.name: Lateral Squat

name: Leg Extension (Machine)
instructions: Sentate en la máquina de extensión con las espinillas bajo el rodillo.
Extendé las rodillas elevando el rodillo hasta estirar las piernas.
Contraé los cuádriceps arriba.
Bajá con control a la posición inicial.
Sentate en la máquina de extensión con las espinillas bajo el rodillo.
Extendé las rodillas elevando el rodillo hasta estirar las piernas.
Contraé los cuádriceps arriba.
Bajá con control a la posición inicial.
es.name: Extensión de Cuádriceps (Máquina)

instructions: The leg extension is a resistance weight training exercise that targets the quadriceps muscle in the legs
The exercise is done using a machine called the Leg Extension Machine
There are various manufacturers of these machines and each one is slightly different
Most gym and weight rooms will have the machine in their facility
The leg extension is an isolated exercise targeting one specific muscle group, the quadriceps
It should not be considered as a total leg workout, such as the squat or deadlift
The exercise consists of bending the leg at the knee and extending the legs, then lowering them back to the original position
en.name: Leg Extension (Machine)

name: Leg Press (Machine)
instructions: Sentate en la prensa con los pies apoyados en la plataforma.
Liberá el seguro y flexioná las rodillas acercando la plataforma.
Empujá con los talones hasta casi extender las piernas sin bloquear las rodillas.
Volvé con control a la posición inicial.
Sentate en la prensa con los pies apoyados en la plataforma.
Liberá el seguro y flexioná las rodillas acercando la plataforma.
Empujá con los talones hasta casi extender las piernas sin bloquear las rodillas.
Volvé con control a la posición inicial.
es.name: Prensa de Piernas (Máquina)

instructions: Using a leg press machine, sit down on the machine and place your legs on the platform directly in front of you at a medium (shoulder width) foot stance. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Lower the safety bars holding the weighted platform in place and press the platform all the way up until your legs are fully extended in front of you. Tip: Make sure that you do not lock your knees. Your torso and the legs should make a perfect 90-degree angle. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
Pushing mainly with the heels of your feet and using the quadriceps go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done. You do not want that platform falling on you fully loaded.
en.name: Leg Press (Machine)

name: Leg Press Horizontal (Machine)
instructions: Sentate en la máquina de prensa horizontal con los pies apoyados en la plataforma.
Liberá el seguro y flexioná las rodillas acercando la plataforma al cuerpo.
Empujá con los talones hasta casi extender las piernas sin bloquear las rodillas.
Volvé de forma controlada a la posición inicial.
Sentate en la máquina de prensa horizontal con los pies apoyados en la plataforma.
Liberá el seguro y flexioná las rodillas acercando la plataforma al cuerpo.
Empujá con los talones hasta casi extender las piernas sin bloquear las rodillas.
Volvé de forma controlada a la posición inicial.
es.name: Prensa Horizontal (Máquina)

instructions: Sit at the horizontal leg press with your feet on the platform.
Release the safety and bend your knees, bringing the platform toward you.
Push through your heels until your legs are nearly extended without locking your knees.
Return under control to the starting position.
en.name: Leg Press Horizontal (Machine)

name: Lunge
instructions: Parate erguido con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera alineada con el pie.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
Parate erguido con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera alineada con el pie.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
es.name: Zancada

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and step forward with your right leg and squat down through your hips, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: Do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. li>
Using mainly the heel of your foot, push up and go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform with the left leg.
en.name: Lunge

name: Lunge (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y el core firme.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
Parate con la barra en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y el core firme.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
es.name: Zancada (Barra)

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and step forward with your right leg and squat down through your hips, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: Do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. li>
Using mainly the heel of your foot, push up and go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform with the left leg.
en.name: Lunge (Barbell)

name: Lunge (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera estable.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera estable.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
es.name: Zancada (Mancuerna)

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and step forward with your right leg and squat down through your hips, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: Do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. li>
Using mainly the heel of your foot, push up and go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform with the left leg.
en.name: Lunge (Dumbbell)

name: Overhead Dumbbell Lunge
instructions: Sostené una mancuerna con ambas manos por encima de la cabeza con los brazos extendidos.
Dá un paso al frente y bajá en zancada flexionando ambas rodillas.
Mantené la mancuerna arriba y el core firme.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
Sostené una mancuerna con ambas manos por encima de la cabeza con los brazos extendidos.
Dá un paso al frente y bajá en zancada flexionando ambas rodillas.
Mantené la mancuerna arriba y el core firme.
Empujá para volver y alterná las piernas.
es.name: Zancada con Mancuerna sobre la Cabeza

instructions: Hold a dumbbell with both hands overhead with arms extended.
Step forward and lower into a lunge, bending both knees.
Keep the dumbbell overhead and your core tight.
Push back up and alternate legs.
en.name: Overhead Dumbbell Lunge

name: Pause Squat (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Mantené la posición baja durante 2 o 3 segundos sin perder tensión.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Mantené la posición baja durante 2 o 3 segundos sin perder tensión.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla con Pausa (Barra)

instructions: Stand with the bar on your upper back and feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower into a squat until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Hold the bottom position for 2 to 3 seconds without losing tension.
Push through your heels to stand back up.
en.name: Pause Squat (Barbell)

name: Pendulum Squat (Machine)
instructions: Ubicate en la máquina de sentadilla pendular con los hombros y pies apoyados.
Bajá flexionando las rodillas siguiendo el arco de la máquina.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Ubicate en la máquina de sentadilla pendular con los hombros y pies apoyados.
Bajá flexionando las rodillas siguiendo el arco de la máquina.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Pendular (Máquina)

instructions: Place your feet in the middle of the plate at about shoulder width
Tense your torso
Keep your neck relaxed
en.name: Pendulum Squat (Machine)

name: Pistol Squat
instructions: Parate sobre una pierna con la otra extendida al frente.
Bajá en sentadilla sobre una sola pierna manteniendo el equilibrio.
Descendé lo más que puedas con control.
Empujá con la pierna de apoyo para volver a subir.
Parate sobre una pierna con la otra extendida al frente.
Bajá en sentadilla sobre una sola pierna manteniendo el equilibrio.
Descendé lo más que puedas con control.
Empujá con la pierna de apoyo para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Pistol

instructions: Pick up a kettlebell with two hands and hold it by the horns. Hold one leg off of the floor and squat down on the other.
Squat down by flexing the knee and sitting back with the hips, holding the kettlebell up in front of you.
Hold the bottom position for a second and then reverse the motion, driving through the heel and keeping your head and chest up.
Lower yourself again and repeat.
en.name: Pistol Squat

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Parate erguido con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso amplio hacia atrás bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera alineada con el pie.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para volver y alterná.
Parate erguido con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso amplio hacia atrás bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera alineada con el pie.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para volver y alterná.
es.name: Zancada Hacia Atrás

instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Take a wide step back, lowering your rear knee toward the floor.
Keep your torso upright and the front knee aligned with your foot.
Push through the front leg to return and alternate.
en.name: Reverse Lunge

name: Reverse Lunge (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso hacia atrás bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y el core firme.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para volver y alterná.
Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso hacia atrás bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y el core firme.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para volver y alterná.
es.name: Zancada Hacia Atrás (Barra)

instructions: Stand with the bar on your upper back and feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering your rear knee toward the floor.
Keep your torso upright and your core tight.
Push through the front leg to return and alternate.
en.name: Reverse Lunge (Barbell)

name: Reverse Lunge (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso hacia atrás bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera estable.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para volver y alterná.
Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso hacia atrás bajando la rodilla trasera hacia el piso.
Mantené el torso erguido y la rodilla delantera estable.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para volver y alterná.
es.name: Zancada Hacia Atrás (Mancuerna)

instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand and feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering your rear knee toward the floor.
Keep your torso upright and the front knee stable.
Push through the front leg to return and alternate.
en.name: Reverse Lunge (Dumbbell)

name: Single Leg Extensions
instructions: Sentate en la máquina de extensión de cuádriceps con una sola pierna bajo el rodillo.
Extendé la rodilla elevando el rodillo hasta estirar la pierna.
Contraé el cuádriceps arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Sentate en la máquina de extensión de cuádriceps con una sola pierna bajo el rodillo.
Extendé la rodilla elevando el rodillo hasta estirar la pierna.
Contraé el cuádriceps arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Extensión de Cuádriceps a Una Pierna

instructions: Sit at the leg extension machine with a single leg under the pad.
Extend your knee, raising the pad until your leg is straight.
Contract the quad at the top.
Lower with control and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Extensions

name: Single Leg Press (Machine)
instructions: Sentate en la prensa y apoyá un solo pie centrado en la plataforma.
Flexioná la rodilla acercando la plataforma al cuerpo.
Empujá con el talón hasta casi extender la pierna sin bloquear la rodilla.
Volvé con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Sentate en la prensa y apoyá un solo pie centrado en la plataforma.
Flexioná la rodilla acercando la plataforma al cuerpo.
Empujá con el talón hasta casi extender la pierna sin bloquear la rodilla.
Volvé con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Prensa a Una Pierna (Máquina)

instructions: Sit at the leg press and place a single foot centered on the platform.
Bend your knee, bringing the platform toward you.
Push through your heel until your leg is nearly extended without locking the knee.
Return with control and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Press (Machine)

name: Sissy Squat (Weighted)
instructions: Parate sujetándote de un soporte con un disco contra el pecho.
Flexioná las rodillas inclinando el torso hacia atrás y elevando los talones.
Descendé sintiendo el estiramiento en los cuádriceps.
Volvé a subir contrayendo los cuádriceps.
Parate sujetándote de un soporte con un disco contra el pecho.
Flexioná las rodillas inclinando el torso hacia atrás y elevando los talones.
Descendé sintiendo el estiramiento en los cuádriceps.
Volvé a subir contrayendo los cuádriceps.
es.name: Sentadilla Sissy (con Peso)

instructions: Standing upright, with feet at shoulder width and toes raised, use one hand to hold onto the beams of a squat rack and the opposite arm to hold a plate on top of your chest. This is your starting position.

As you use one arm to hold yourself, bend at the knees and slowly lower your torso toward the ground by bringing your pelvis and knees forward. Inhale as you go down and stop when your upper and lower legs almost create a 90-degree angle. Hold the stretch position for a second.
After your one second hold, use your thigh muscles to bring your torso back up to the starting position. Exhale as you move up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.
en.name: Sissy Squat (Weighted)

name: Split Squat (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate en posición de zancada con una mancuerna en cada mano.
Bajá flexionando ambas rodillas sin mover los pies.
Mantené el torso erguido.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para subir y completá antes de cambiar.
Parate en posición de zancada con una mancuerna en cada mano.
Bajá flexionando ambas rodillas sin mover los pies.
Mantené el torso erguido.
Empujá con la pierna delantera para subir y completá antes de cambiar.
es.name: Sentadilla Split (Mancuerna)

instructions: Position yourself into a staggered stance with the rear foot elevated and front foot forward.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, letting them hang at the sides. This will be your starting position.
Begin by descending, flexing your knee and hip to lower your body down. Maintain good posture througout the movement. Keep the front knee in line with the foot as you perform the exercise.
At the bottom of the movement, drive through the heel to extend the knee and hip to return to the starting position.
en.name: Split Squat (Dumbbell)

name: Squat (Band)
instructions: Parate sobre una banda elástica pasándola por encima de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones resistiendo la tensión para subir.
Parate sobre una banda elástica pasándola por encima de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones resistiendo la tensión para subir.
es.name: Sentadilla (Banda)

instructions: Set up the bands on the sleeves, secured to either band pegs, the rack, or dumbbells so that there is appropriate tension.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.
en.name: Squat (Band)

name: Squat (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y el pecho arriba.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y los pies al ancho de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y el pecho arriba.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla (Barra)

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and hips as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Squat (Barbell)

name: Squat (Bodyweight)
instructions: Parate con los pies al ancho de los hombros y los brazos al frente.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y el pecho arriba.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con los pies al ancho de los hombros y los brazos al frente.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y el pecho arriba.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla (Peso Corporal)

instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. You can place your hands behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing your knees and hips, sitting back with your hips.
Continue down to full depth if you are able,and quickly reverse the motion until you return to the starting position. As you squat, keep your head and chest up and push your knees out.
en.name: Squat (Bodyweight)

name: Squat (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano a los costados o una contra el pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano a los costados o una contra el pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla (Mancuerna)

instructions: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing the side of your legs).

Position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section.

Begin to slowly lower your torso by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until your thighs are parallel to the floor. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise your torso as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Squat (Dumbbell)

name: Squat (Machine)
instructions: Ubicate en la máquina de sentadilla con los hombros y pies apoyados.
Bajá flexionando las rodillas manteniendo la espalda apoyada.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Ubicate en la máquina de sentadilla con los hombros y pies apoyados.
Bajá flexionando las rodillas manteniendo la espalda apoyada.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla (Máquina)

instructions: To begin, first set the bar on the height that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Squat (Machine)

name: Squat (Smith Machine)
instructions: Ubicate bajo la barra de la máquina Smith apoyada en la espalda alta.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Ubicate bajo la barra de la máquina Smith apoyada en la espalda alta.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla (Máquina Smith)

instructions: To begin, first set the bar on the height that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Squat (Smith Machine)

name: Squat (Suspension)
instructions: Tomá las cintas de suspensión al frente para asistirte.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Tomá las cintas de suspensión al frente para asistirte.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla (TRX)

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and hips as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Squat (Suspension)

name: Step Up
instructions: Parate frente a un cajón o banco firme.
Subí apoyando un pie completo sobre el cajón y empujá con ese talón.
Elevá el cuerpo hasta extender la pierna arriba.
Bajá con control y alterná las piernas.
Parate frente a un cajón o banco firme.
Subí apoyando un pie completo sobre el cajón y empujá con ese talón.
Elevá el cuerpo hasta extender la pierna arriba.
Bajá con control y alterná las piernas.
es.name: Subida al Cajón

instructions: Stand facing a sturdy box or bench.
Step up, planting your whole foot on the box and driving through that heel.
Rise until your leg is extended at the top.
Step down with control and alternate legs.
en.name: Step Up

name: Sumo Squat
instructions: Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas alineadas con los pies.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas alineadas con los pies.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Sumo

instructions: Stand with feet wide apart and toes turned out.
Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight and knees tracking over your toes.
Descend until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Push through your heels to stand back up.
en.name: Sumo Squat

name: Sumo Squat (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera, con la barra en la espalda alta.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas hacia afuera.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera, con la barra en la espalda alta.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas hacia afuera.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Sumo (Barra)

instructions: Stand with feet wide and toes out, the bar on your upper back.
Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight and knees out.
Descend until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Push through your heels to stand back up.
en.name: Sumo Squat (Barbell)

name: Sumo Squat (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera, sosteniendo una mancuerna con ambas manos al frente.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas hacia afuera.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera, sosteniendo una mancuerna con ambas manos al frente.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas hacia afuera.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Sumo (Mancuerna)

instructions: Stand with feet wide and toes out, holding a dumbbell with both hands in front.
Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight and knees out.
Descend until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Push through your heels to stand back up.
en.name: Sumo Squat (Dumbbell)

name: Sumo Squat (Kettlebell)
instructions: Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera, sosteniendo una pesa rusa con ambas manos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas hacia afuera.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
Parate con los pies bien separados y las puntas hacia afuera, sosteniendo una pesa rusa con ambas manos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta y las rodillas hacia afuera.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Sumo (Kettlebell)

instructions: Stand with feet wide and toes out, holding a kettlebell with both hands.
Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight and knees out.
Descend until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Push through your heels to stand back up.
en.name: Sumo Squat (Kettlebell)

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Parate erguido con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando en zancada.
Empujá con la pierna delantera y avanzá con la otra en el siguiente paso.
Continuá alternando las piernas avanzando.
Parate erguido con los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando en zancada.
Empujá con la pierna delantera y avanzá con la otra en el siguiente paso.
Continuá alternando las piernas avanzando.
es.name: Zancada Caminando

instructions: Begin standing with your feet shoulder width apart and a barbell across your upper back.

Step forward with one leg, flexing the knees to drop your hips. Descend until your rear knee nearly touches the ground. Your posture should remain upright, and your front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of your lead foot and extend both knees to raise yourself back up.
Step forward with your rear foot, repeating the lunge on the opposite leg.
en.name: Walking Lunge

name: Walking Lunge (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando en zancada.
Empujá con la pierna delantera y avanzá con la otra.
Continuá alternando las piernas avanzando.
Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y los pies al ancho de la cadera.
Dá un paso al frente bajando en zancada.
Empujá con la pierna delantera y avanzá con la otra.
Continuá alternando las piernas avanzando.
es.name: Zancada Caminando (Mancuerna)

instructions: Begin standing with your feet shoulder width apart and a barbell across your upper back.

Step forward with one leg, flexing the knees to drop your hips. Descend until your rear knee nearly touches the ground. Your posture should remain upright, and your front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of your lead foot and extend both knees to raise yourself back up.
Step forward with your rear foot, repeating the lunge on the opposite leg.
en.name: Walking Lunge (Dumbbell)

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Apoyá la espalda contra una pared y bajá hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Mantené las rodillas a 90 grados y la espalda pegada a la pared.
Sostené la posición el tiempo indicado.
Mantené el peso en los talones y el core firme.
Apoyá la espalda contra una pared y bajá hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Mantené las rodillas a 90 grados y la espalda pegada a la pared.
Sostené la posición el tiempo indicado.
Mantené el peso en los talones y el core firme.
es.name: Sentadilla Isométrica en Pared

instructions: The Wall Sit (or wall chair) is an isometric exercise that mainly involves the leg muscles, improving muscular endurance and stability
Here are the main and secondary muscles activated during the exercise
en.name: Wall Sit

name: Zercher Squat
instructions: Sostené la barra en el pliegue de los codos, frente al pecho.
Con los pies al ancho de los hombros, bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.

Con los pies al ancho de los hombros, bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir.
es.name: Sentadilla Zercher

instructions: Hold the bar in the crooks of your elbows, in front of your chest.
With feet shoulder-width apart, lower into a squat keeping your torso upright.
Descend until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Push through your heels to stand back up.
en.name: Zercher Squat

name: Glute Ham Raise
instructions: Ubicate en el banco de glute-ham con los pies sujetos y el cuerpo recto.
Bajá el torso hacia adelante controlando con los isquiotibiales.
Frená el descenso y empujá con los isquiotibiales para subir.
Mantené la espalda neutra durante el movimiento.
Ubicate en el banco de glute-ham con los pies sujetos y el cuerpo recto.
Bajá el torso hacia adelante controlando con los isquiotibiales.
Frená el descenso y empujá con los isquiotibiales para subir.
Mantené la espalda neutra durante el movimiento.
es.name: Elevación Femoral (GHR)

instructions: Begin by adjusting the equipment to fit your body. Place your feet against the footplate in between the rollers as you lie facedown. Your knees should be just behind the pad.

Start from the bottom of the movement. Keep your back arched as you begin the movement by flexing the knees. Drive your toes into the foot plate as you do so. Keep your upper body straight, and continue until your body is upright.
Return to the starting position, keeping your descent under control.
en.name: Glute Ham Raise

name: Good Morning (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y las rodillas levemente flexionadas.
Inclinate hacia adelante desde la cadera bajando el torso con la espalda recta.
Sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
Parate con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y las rodillas levemente flexionadas.
Inclinate hacia adelante desde la cadera bajando el torso con la espalda recta.
Sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
es.name: Buenos Días (Barra)

instructions: Begin with a bar on a rack at shoulder height. Rack the bar across the rear of your shoulders as you would a power squat, not on top of your shoulders. Keep your back tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your knees slightly bent. Step back from the rack.
Begin by bending at the hips, moving them back as you bend over to near parallel. Keep your back arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Reverse the motion by extending through the hips with your glutes and hamstrings. Continue until you have returned to the starting position.
en.name: Good Morning (Barbell)

name: Lying Leg Curl (Machine)
instructions: Acostate boca abajo en la máquina de curl femoral con el rodillo sobre los talones.
Flexioná las rodillas llevando el rodillo hacia los glúteos.
Contraé los isquiotibiales en la parte alta.
Bajá de forma controlada hasta extender las piernas.
Acostate boca abajo en la máquina de curl femoral con el rodillo sobre los talones.
Flexioná las rodillas llevando el rodillo hacia los glúteos.
Contraé los isquiotibiales en la parte alta.
Bajá de forma controlada hasta extender las piernas.
es.name: Curl Femoral Acostado (Máquina)

instructions: Lie face down on the leg curl machine with the pad over your heels.
Bend your knees, bringing the pad toward your glutes.
Contract your hamstrings at the top.
Lower under control until your legs are extended.
en.name: Lying Leg Curl (Machine)

name: Nordic Hamstrings Curls
instructions: Arrodillate con los tobillos sujetos por un compañero o soporte.
Con el cuerpo recto, bajá el torso hacia el piso resistiendo con los isquiotibiales.
Descendé lo más lento que puedas y frená la caída con las manos si es necesario.
Empujá con los isquiotibiales para volver a la posición inicial.
Arrodillate con los tobillos sujetos por un compañero o soporte.
Con el cuerpo recto, bajá el torso hacia el piso resistiendo con los isquiotibiales.
Descendé lo más lento que puedas y frená la caída con las manos si es necesario.
Empujá con los isquiotibiales para volver a la posición inicial.
es.name: Curl Nórdico de Femoral

instructions: Kneel with your ankles secured by a partner or support.
With your body straight, lower your torso toward the floor, resisting with your hamstrings.
Descend as slowly as you can and catch yourself with your hands if needed.
Push through your hamstrings to return to the start.
en.name: Nordic Hamstrings Curls

name: Romanian Deadlift (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra al frente y las rodillas levemente flexionadas.
Inclinate desde la cadera bajando la barra por delante de las piernas.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
Parate con la barra al frente y las rodillas levemente flexionadas.
Inclinate desde la cadera bajando la barra por delante de las piernas.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
es.name: Peso Muerto Rumano (Barra)

instructions: Put a barbell in front of you on the ground and grab it using a pronated (palms facing down) grip that a little wider than shoulder width. Tip: Depending on the weight used, you may need wrist wraps to perform the exercise and also a raised platform in order to allow for better range of motion.
Bend the knees slightly and keep the shins vertical, hips back and back straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your back and arms completely straight at all times, use your hips to lift the bar as you exhale. Tip: The movement should not be fast but steady and under control.

Once you are standing completely straight up, lower the bar by pushing the hips back, only slightly bending the knees, unlike when squatting. Tip: Take a deep breath at the start of the movement and keep your chest up. Hold your breath as you lower and exhale as you complete the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Romanian Deadlift (Barbell)

name: Romanian Deadlift (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano al frente y las rodillas levemente flexionadas.
Inclinate desde la cadera bajando las mancuernas por delante de las piernas.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano al frente y las rodillas levemente flexionadas.
Inclinate desde la cadera bajando las mancuernas por delante de las piernas.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
es.name: Peso Muerto Rumano (Mancuerna)

instructions: Put a barbell in front of you on the ground and grab it using a pronated (palms facing down) grip that a little wider than shoulder width. Tip: Depending on the weight used, you may need wrist wraps to perform the exercise and also a raised platform in order to allow for better range of motion.
Bend the knees slightly and keep the shins vertical, hips back and back straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your back and arms completely straight at all times, use your hips to lift the bar as you exhale. Tip: The movement should not be fast but steady and under control.

Once you are standing completely straight up, lower the bar by pushing the hips back, only slightly bending the knees, unlike when squatting. Tip: Take a deep breath at the start of the movement and keep your chest up. Hold your breath as you lower and exhale as you complete the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Romanian Deadlift (Dumbbell)

name: Seated Leg Curl (Machine)
instructions: Sentate en la máquina de curl femoral con las piernas sobre el rodillo.
Flexioná las rodillas llevando el rodillo hacia abajo y atrás.
Contraé los isquiotibiales al final del recorrido.
Volvé de forma controlada hasta extender las piernas.
Sentate en la máquina de curl femoral con las piernas sobre el rodillo.
Flexioná las rodillas llevando el rodillo hacia abajo y atrás.
Contraé los isquiotibiales al final del recorrido.
Volvé de forma controlada hasta extender las piernas.
es.name: Curl Femoral Sentado (Máquina)

instructions: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and sit on the machine with your back against the back support pad.

Place the back of lower leg on top of padded lever (just a few inches under the calves) and secure the lap pad against your thighs, just above the knees. Then grasp the side handles on the machine as you point your toes straight (or you can also use any of the other two stances) and ensure that the legs are fully straight right in front of you. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, pull the machine lever as far as possible to the back of your thighs by flexing at the knees. Keep your torso stationary at all times. Hold the contracted position for a second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Seated Leg Curl (Machine)

name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift (Barbell)
instructions: Parate sobre una pierna sosteniendo una barra al frente con ambas manos.
Inclinate hacia adelante bajando la barra mientras elevás la pierna libre hacia atrás.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en el isquiotibial.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo el glúteo y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Parate sobre una pierna sosteniendo una barra al frente con ambas manos.
Inclinate hacia adelante bajando la barra mientras elevás la pierna libre hacia atrás.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en el isquiotibial.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo el glúteo y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Peso Muerto Rumano a Una Pierna (Barra)

instructions: Stand on one leg holding a bar in front with both hands.
Hinge forward, lowering the bar while raising your free leg behind you.
Keep your back straight and feel the stretch in your hamstring.
Return to standing by squeezing your glute and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift (Barbell)

name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate sobre una pierna con una mancuerna en la mano.
Inclinate hacia adelante bajando la mancuerna mientras elevás la pierna libre hacia atrás.
Mantené la espalda recta y la cadera nivelada.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo el glúteo y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Parate sobre una pierna con una mancuerna en la mano.
Inclinate hacia adelante bajando la mancuerna mientras elevás la pierna libre hacia atrás.
Mantené la espalda recta y la cadera nivelada.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo el glúteo y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Peso Muerto Rumano a Una Pierna (Mancuerna)

instructions: Stand on one leg with a dumbbell in hand.
Hinge forward, lowering the dumbbell while raising your free leg behind you.
Keep your back straight and hips level.
Return to standing by squeezing your glute and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift (Dumbbell)

name: Standing Leg Curls
instructions: Parate en la máquina de curl femoral de pie con un tobillo detrás del rodillo.
Flexioná la rodilla llevando el talón hacia el glúteo.
Contraé el isquiotibial en la parte alta.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Parate en la máquina de curl femoral de pie con un tobillo detrás del rodillo.
Flexioná la rodilla llevando el talón hacia el glúteo.
Contraé el isquiotibial en la parte alta.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Curl Femoral de Pie

instructions: Stand at the standing leg curl machine with one ankle behind the pad.
Bend your knee, bringing your heel toward your glute.
Contract the hamstring at the top.
Lower with control and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Standing Leg Curls

name: Straight Leg Deadlift
instructions: Parate con la barra al frente y las piernas casi extendidas.
Inclinate hacia adelante desde la cadera bajando la barra por delante de las piernas.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
Parate con la barra al frente y las piernas casi extendidas.
Inclinate hacia adelante desde la cadera bajando la barra por delante de las piernas.
Mantené la espalda recta y sentí el estiramiento en los isquiotibiales.
Volvé a la vertical contrayendo glúteos e isquiotibiales.
es.name: Peso Muerto con Piernas Rectas

instructions: Stand with the bar in front and your legs nearly extended.
Hinge forward from the hips, lowering the bar down the front of your legs.
Keep your back straight and feel the hamstring stretch.
Return to standing by squeezing your glutes and hamstrings.
en.name: Straight Leg Deadlift

name: Calf Extension (Machine)
instructions: Sentate o parate en la máquina de gemelos con la punta de los pies en la plataforma.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos en la parte alta.
Bajá los talones de forma controlada sintiendo el estiramiento.
Sentate o parate en la máquina de gemelos con la punta de los pies en la plataforma.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos en la parte alta.
Bajá los talones de forma controlada sintiendo el estiramiento.
es.name: Extensión de Gemelos (Máquina)

instructions: Sit or stand at the calf machine with the balls of your feet on the platform.
Raise your heels, extending your ankles as high as possible.
Contract your calves at the top.
Lower your heels under control, feeling the stretch.
en.name: Calf Extension (Machine)

name: Calf Press (Machine)
instructions: Sentate en la prensa con la punta de los pies en el borde de la plataforma.
Empujá con la punta de los pies extendiendo los tobillos.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Volvé con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
Sentate en la prensa con la punta de los pies en el borde de la plataforma.
Empujá con la punta de los pies extendiendo los tobillos.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Volvé con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
es.name: Press de Gemelos (Máquina)

instructions: Adjust the seat so that your legs are only slightly bent in the start position. The balls of your feet should be firmly on the platform.
Select an appropriate weight, and grasp the handles. This will be your starting position.

Straighten the legs by extending the knees, just barely lifting the weight from the stack. Your ankle should be fully flexed, toes pointing up. Execute the movement by pressing downward through the balls of your feet as far as possible.
After a brief pause, reverse the motion and repeat.
en.name: Calf Press (Machine)

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sentate en la máquina de gemelos con la punta de los pies en la plataforma y las rodillas bajo el apoyo.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
Sentate en la máquina de gemelos con la punta de los pies en la plataforma y las rodillas bajo el apoyo.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelos Sentado

instructions: Sit on the machine and place your toes on the lower portion of the platform provided with the heels extending off. Choose the toe positioning of your choice (forward, in, or out) as per the beginning of this chapter.

Place your lower thighs under the lever pad, which will need to be adjusted according to the height of your thighs. Now place your hands on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping forward.
Lift the lever slightly by pushing your heels up and release the safety bar. This will be your starting position.
Slowly lower your heels by bending at the ankles until the calves are fully stretched. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Raise the heels by extending the ankles as high as possible as you contract the calves and breathe out. Hold the top contraction for a second.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Seated Calf Raise

name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Parate sobre una pierna con la punta del pie en un escalón y el talón colgando.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Parate sobre una pierna con la punta del pie en un escalón y el talón colgando.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelo a Una Pierna de Pie

instructions: Stand on one leg with the ball of your foot on a step and your heel hanging.
Raise your heel, extending your ankle as high as possible.
Contract the calf at the top.
Lower with control, feeling the stretch, and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise

name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise (Barbell)
instructions: Parate sobre una pierna con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y la punta del pie en un escalón.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Parate sobre una pierna con la barra apoyada en la espalda alta y la punta del pie en un escalón.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelo a Una Pierna de Pie (Barra)

instructions: Stand on one leg with the bar on your upper back and the ball of your foot on a step.
Raise your heel, extending your ankle as high as possible.
Contract the calf at the top.
Lower with control and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise (Barbell)

name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate sobre una pierna sosteniendo una mancuerna del mismo lado, con la punta del pie en un escalón.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Parate sobre una pierna sosteniendo una mancuerna del mismo lado, con la punta del pie en un escalón.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelo a Una Pierna de Pie (Mancuerna)

instructions: Stand on one leg holding a dumbbell on the same side, with the ball of your foot on a step.
Raise your heel, extending your ankle as high as possible.
Contract the calf at the top.
Lower with control and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise (Dumbbell)

name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise (Machine)
instructions: Ubicate en la máquina de gemelos de pie con un solo pie en la plataforma.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
Ubicate en la máquina de gemelos de pie con un solo pie en la plataforma.
Elevá el talón extendiendo el tobillo lo más alto posible.
Contraé el gemelo arriba.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de pierna.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelo a Una Pierna de Pie (Máquina)

instructions: Get on the standing calf machine with a single foot on the platform.
Raise your heel, extending your ankle as high as possible.
Contract the calf at the top.
Lower with control and finish before switching legs.
en.name: Single Leg Standing Calf Raise (Machine)

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Parate con la punta de los pies en un escalón y los talones colgando.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
Parate con la punta de los pies en un escalón y los talones colgando.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelos de Pie

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the bar on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck).
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your starting position. Tip: For better range of motion you may also place the ball of your feet on a wooden block but be careful as this option requires more balance and a sturdy block.

Raise your heels as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go back down.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Standing Calf Raise

name: Standing Calf Raise (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra en la espalda alta y la punta de los pies en un escalón.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
Parate con la barra en la espalda alta y la punta de los pies en un escalón.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelos de Pie (Barra)

instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the bar on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck).

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your starting position. Tip: For better range of motion you may also place the ball of your feet on a wooden block but be careful as this option requires more balance and a sturdy block.

Raise your heels as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go back down.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Standing Calf Raise (Barbell)

name: Standing Calf Raise (Dumbbell)
instructions: Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y la punta de los pies en un escalón.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
Parate con una mancuerna en cada mano y la punta de los pies en un escalón.
Elevá los talones extendiendo los tobillos lo más alto posible.
Contraé los gemelos arriba.
Bajá con control sintiendo el estiramiento.
es.name: Elevación de Gemelos de Pie (Mancuerna)

instructions: Stand with your torso upright holding two dumbbells in your hands by your sides. Place the ball of the foot on a sturdy and stable wooden board (that is around 2-3 inches tall) while your heels extend off and touch the floor. This will be your starting position.

With the toes pointing either straight (to hit all parts equally), inwards (for emphasis on the outer head) or outwards (for emphasis on the inner head), raise the heels off the floor as you exhale by contracting the calves. Hold the top contraction for a second.
As you inhale, go back to the starting position by slowly lowering the heels.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.
en.name: Standing Calf Raise (Dumbbell)

name: Standing Calf Raise (Machine)
