name: Dumbbell Snatch
instructions: Parate con una mancuerna en el piso entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Elevá la mancuerna de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la mancuerna por encima de la cabeza con el brazo extendido.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de brazo.
Parate con una mancuerna en el piso entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Elevá la mancuerna de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la mancuerna por encima de la cabeza con el brazo extendido.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de brazo.
es.name: Arranque con Mancuerna

instructions: Place your feet at a shoulder width stance with the barbell resting right above the connection between the toes and the rest of the foot.

With a palms facing down grip, bend at the knees and keeping the back flat grab the bar using a wider than shoulder width grip. Bring the hips down and make sure that your body drops as if you were going to sit on a chair. This will be your starting position.
Start pushing the floor as if it were a moving platform with your feet and simultaneously start lifting the barbell keeping it close to your legs.
As the bar reaches the middle of your thighs, push the floor with your legs and lift your body to a complete extension in an explosive motion.
Lift your shoulders back in a shrugging movement as you bring the bar up while lifting your elbows out to the side and keeping them above the bar for as long as possible.

Now in a very quick but powerful motion, you have to get your body under the barbell when it has reached a high enough point where it can be controlled and drop while locking your arms and holding the barbell overhead as you assume a squat position.
Finalize the movement by rising up out of the squat position to finish the lift. At the end of the lift both feet should be on line and the arms fully extended holding the barbell overhead.
en.name: Dumbbell Snatch

name: Farmers Walk
instructions: Parate entre dos mancuernas o pesas pesadas y agarralas con la espalda recta.
Incorporate manteniendo los hombros atrás y el core firme.
Caminá con pasos cortos y firmes la distancia indicada.
Apoyá las cargas con control al terminar.
Parate entre dos mancuernas o pesas pesadas y agarralas con la espalda recta.
Incorporate manteniendo los hombros atrás y el core firme.
Caminá con pasos cortos y firmes la distancia indicada.
Apoyá las cargas con control al terminar.
es.name: Caminata del Granjero

instructions: Stand between two heavy dumbbells or weights and grab them with a straight back.
Stand up, keeping your shoulders back and core tight.
Walk with short, firm steps for the prescribed distance.
Set the loads down with control when finished.
en.name: Farmers Walk

name: Front Lever Hold
instructions: Colgate de la barra con los brazos extendidos y agarre prono.
Elevá el cuerpo hasta quedar horizontal, paralelo al piso, con el cuerpo recto.
Mantené el core y los dorsales contraídos para sostener la posición.
Aguantá el tiempo indicado y bajá con control.
Colgate de la barra con los brazos extendidos y agarre prono.
Elevá el cuerpo hasta quedar horizontal, paralelo al piso, con el cuerpo recto.
Mantené el core y los dorsales contraídos para sostener la posición.
Aguantá el tiempo indicado y bajá con control.
es.name: Front Lever Isométrico

instructions: Hang from the bar with arms extended and a pronated grip.
Raise your body until it's horizontal, parallel to the floor, with your body straight.
Keep your core and lats contracted to hold the position.
Hold the prescribed time and lower with control.
en.name: Front Lever Hold

name: Front Lever Raise
instructions: Colgate de la barra con los brazos extendidos y agarre prono.
Elevá el cuerpo recto hasta la horizontal contrayendo dorsales y core.
Mantené el cuerpo alineado en el punto más alto.
Bajá de forma controlada hasta colgar.
Colgate de la barra con los brazos extendidos y agarre prono.
Elevá el cuerpo recto hasta la horizontal contrayendo dorsales y core.
Mantené el cuerpo alineado en el punto más alto.
Bajá de forma controlada hasta colgar.
es.name: Elevación de Front Lever

instructions: Select the weight on a low pulley machine and grasp the single hand cable attachment that is attached to the low pulley with your left hand.

Face away from the pulley and put your arm straight down with the hand cable attachment in front of your thighs at arms' length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left arm to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hand always faces down. Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top.
Now as you inhale lower the arm back down slowly to the starting position.
Once all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for this arm, switch arms and perform the exercise with the right one.
en.name: Front Lever Raise

name: Handstand Hold
instructions: Ponete en parada de manos apoyando los pies en la pared si lo necesitás.
Alineá muñecas, hombros y cadera con el cuerpo recto.
Contraé el core y los hombros para mantener el equilibrio.
Sostené la posición durante el tiempo indicado.
Ponete en parada de manos apoyando los pies en la pared si lo necesitás.
Alineá muñecas, hombros y cadera con el cuerpo recto.
Contraé el core y los hombros para mantener el equilibrio.
Sostené la posición durante el tiempo indicado.
es.name: Parada de Manos Isométrica

instructions: Get into a handstand, resting your feet on the wall if needed.
Align your wrists, shoulders and hips with your body straight.
Contract your core and shoulders to keep your balance.
Hold the position for the prescribed time.
en.name: Handstand Hold

name: Hang Clean
instructions: Parate sosteniendo la barra a la altura de los muslos con la espalda recta.
Extendé cadera y rodillas de forma explosiva elevando la barra.
Recibí la barra en los hombros flexionando las rodillas.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
Parate sosteniendo la barra a la altura de los muslos con la espalda recta.
Extendé cadera y rodillas de forma explosiva elevando la barra.
Recibí la barra en los hombros flexionando las rodillas.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
es.name: Cargada desde Suspensión

instructions: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, with the bar hanging at the mid thigh position. Your back should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Begin by aggressively extending through the hips, knees and ankles, driving the weight upward. As you do so, shrug your shoulders towards your ears.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.
en.name: Hang Clean

name: Hang Snatch
instructions: Parate sosteniendo la barra a la altura de los muslos con la espalda recta.
Extendé cadera y rodillas de forma explosiva elevando la barra.
Recibí la barra por encima de la cabeza flexionando las rodillas.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
Parate sosteniendo la barra a la altura de los muslos con la espalda recta.
Extendé cadera y rodillas de forma explosiva elevando la barra.
Recibí la barra por encima de la cabeza flexionando las rodillas.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
es.name: Arranque desde Suspensión

instructions: Begin with a wide grip on the bar, with an overhand or hook grip. The feet should be directly below the hips with the feet turned out. Your knees should be slightly bent, and the torso inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be at the hips. This will be your starting position.
Aggressively extend through the legs and hips. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Return to a standing position with the weight overhead. Follow by returning the weight to the ground under control.
en.name: Hang Snatch

name: High Knee Skips
instructions: Parate erguido y realizá un skip elevando la rodilla bien alto.
Impulsate hacia arriba en cada paso coordinando el braceo.
Aterrizá suave sobre la punta de los pies.
Mantené el ritmo alternando las piernas.
Parate erguido y realizá un skip elevando la rodilla bien alto.
Impulsate hacia arriba en cada paso coordinando el braceo.
Aterrizá suave sobre la punta de los pies.
Mantené el ritmo alternando las piernas.
es.name: Skipping con Rodillas Altas

instructions: Stand tall and perform a skip, driving your knee up high.
Push upward each step, coordinating your arm swing.
Land softly on the balls of your feet.
Keep a rhythm, alternating legs.
en.name: High Knee Skips

name: High Knees
instructions: Parate erguido con el core activo.
Corré en el lugar elevando las rodillas a la altura de la cadera.
Coordiná el braceo con el movimiento de las piernas.
Mantené un ritmo rápido y constante.
Parate erguido con el core activo.
Corré en el lugar elevando las rodillas a la altura de la cadera.
Coordiná el braceo con el movimiento de las piernas.
Mantené un ritmo rápido y constante.
es.name: Rodillas Altas

instructions: Stand tall with your core active.
Run in place, driving your knees up to hip height.
Coordinate your arm swing with your leg movement.
Keep a fast, steady rhythm.
en.name: High Knees

name: Jump Shrug
instructions: Parate con la barra o mancuernas al frente de los muslos.
Flexioná levemente las rodillas y extendé cadera y rodillas con explosividad.
Encogé los hombros con fuerza acompañando el impulso, elevándote en punta de pie.
Bajá con control y repetí.
Parate con la barra o mancuernas al frente de los muslos.
Flexioná levemente las rodillas y extendé cadera y rodillas con explosividad.
Encogé los hombros con fuerza acompañando el impulso, elevándote en punta de pie.
Bajá con control y repetí.
es.name: Encogimiento con Salto

instructions: Stand with the bar or dumbbells in front of your thighs.
Slightly bend your knees and extend your hips and knees explosively.
Shrug your shoulders hard with the drive, rising onto the balls of your feet.
Lower with control and repeat.
en.name: Jump Shrug

name: Jumping Jack
instructions: Parate erguido con los pies juntos y los brazos a los costados.
Saltá abriendo las piernas y elevando los brazos por encima de la cabeza.
Saltá de nuevo volviendo a la posición inicial.
Mantené un ritmo constante y continuo.
Parate erguido con los pies juntos y los brazos a los costados.
Saltá abriendo las piernas y elevando los brazos por encima de la cabeza.
Saltá de nuevo volviendo a la posición inicial.
Mantené un ritmo constante y continuo.
es.name: Salto de Tijera

instructions: Stand tall with feet together and arms at your sides.
Jump, spreading your legs and raising your arms overhead.
Jump again, returning to the starting position.
Keep a steady, continuous rhythm.
en.name: Jumping Jack

name: Kettlebell Clean
instructions: Parate con una pesa rusa entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Elevá la pesa de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la pesa en el hombro rotando la muñeca.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de brazo.
Parate con una pesa rusa entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Elevá la pesa de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la pesa en el hombro rotando la muñeca.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de brazo.
es.name: Cargada con Kettlebell

instructions: With a barbell on the floor close to the shins, take an overhand (or hook) grip just outside the legs. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight. Move the weight with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back, with the arms still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front squat position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom squat position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.
en.name: Kettlebell Clean

name: Kettlebell High Pull
instructions: Parate con una pesa rusa entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Extendé cadera y rodillas de forma explosiva elevando la pesa.
Tirá de la pesa hacia el mentón con el codo alto.
Bajá con control y repetí.
Parate con una pesa rusa entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Extendé cadera y rodillas de forma explosiva elevando la pesa.
Tirá de la pesa hacia el mentón con el codo alto.
Bajá con control y repetí.
es.name: Tirón Alto con Kettlebell

instructions: Use a light barbell, perform explosive lift up starting from underneath knee cap level
Lift/raise explosively using hips, at shoulder level
Tempo: 2111
en.name: Kettlebell High Pull

name: Kettlebell Snatch
instructions: Parate con una pesa rusa entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Elevá la pesa de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la pesa por encima de la cabeza con el brazo extendido.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de brazo.
Parate con una pesa rusa entre los pies y la cadera flexionada.
Elevá la pesa de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la pesa por encima de la cabeza con el brazo extendido.
Bajá con control y completá antes de cambiar de brazo.
es.name: Arranque con Kettlebell

instructions: Place your feet at a shoulder width stance with the barbell resting right above the connection between the toes and the rest of the foot.

With a palms facing down grip, bend at the knees and keeping the back flat grab the bar using a wider than shoulder width grip. Bring the hips down and make sure that your body drops as if you were going to sit on a chair. This will be your starting position.
Start pushing the floor as if it were a moving platform with your feet and simultaneously start lifting the barbell keeping it close to your legs.
As the bar reaches the middle of your thighs, push the floor with your legs and lift your body to a complete extension in an explosive motion.
Lift your shoulders back in a shrugging movement as you bring the bar up while lifting your elbows out to the side and keeping them above the bar for as long as possible.

Now in a very quick but powerful motion, you have to get your body under the barbell when it has reached a high enough point where it can be controlled and drop while locking your arms and holding the barbell overhead as you assume a squat position.
Finalize the movement by rising up out of the squat position to finish the lift. At the end of the lift both feet should be on line and the arms fully extended holding the barbell overhead.
en.name: Kettlebell Snatch

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Parate con una pesa rusa en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Impulsá la pesa hacia adelante y arriba extendiendo la cadera con fuerza.
Dejá que la pesa suba hasta la altura del pecho por el impulso.
Controlá el descenso entre las piernas y encadená la siguiente repetición.
Parate con una pesa rusa en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Impulsá la pesa hacia adelante y arriba extendiendo la cadera con fuerza.
Dejá que la pesa suba hasta la altura del pecho por el impulso.
Controlá el descenso entre las piernas y encadená la siguiente repetición.
es.name: Swing con Kettlebell

instructions: While kettlebell swings are a full-body workout, they mostly target the muscles along the posterior chain (back of the body)
The main muscles used are the glutes, hamstrings, spinal erectors, and muscles of the upper back
en.name: Kettlebell Swing

name: Kettlebell Turkish Get Up
instructions: Acostate boca arriba sosteniendo una pesa rusa con un brazo extendido hacia el techo.
Incorporate paso a paso hasta quedar de pie, manteniendo la pesa arriba.
Invertí la secuencia para volver a acostarte con control.
Mantené el brazo extendido y la vista en la pesa todo el tiempo.
Acostate boca arriba sosteniendo una pesa rusa con un brazo extendido hacia el techo.
Incorporate paso a paso hasta quedar de pie, manteniendo la pesa arriba.
Invertí la secuencia para volver a acostarte con control.
Mantené el brazo extendido y la vista en la pesa todo el tiempo.
es.name: Turkish Get Up con Kettlebell

instructions: Starting on back, move to the standing position with dumbbell in one hand
Switch hands between reps
en.name: Kettlebell Turkish Get Up

name: Landmine Squat and Press
instructions: Sostené el extremo de una barra landmine a la altura del pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Al subir, empujá la barra hacia arriba y adelante.
Bajá la barra al pecho y encadená la siguiente sentadilla.
Sostené el extremo de una barra landmine a la altura del pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Al subir, empujá la barra hacia arriba y adelante.
Bajá la barra al pecho y encadená la siguiente sentadilla.
es.name: Sentadilla y Press Landmine

instructions: Bar Position: Anchor one end of a barbell in a landmine attachment or a secure corner
Stance: Stand facing the barbell with feet slightly wider than shoulder-width
Turn your toes out 10–35 degrees to allow for better pelvic movement and depth
Grip: Cup the free end of the barbell with both hands (fingers interlaced or overlapping) and hold it at mid-chest level, just below the collarbone
Descent: Brace your core and sit back into a squat, keeping your chest up and weight on your heels
Depth: Lower until your thighs are at least parallel to the floor
A good reference is when your elbows touch the tops of your thighs or just inside your knees
Posture: Ensure your back remains flat and your spine neutral throughout the movement
Drive: Powerfully drive through your heels to stand up
Use the momentum from your legs to "thrust" the weight upward
Extension: In one fluid motion, press the bar overhead until your arms are fully extended
At the top, your biceps should be near your ears
The "Lean": As you reach the top of the press, lean slightly forward into the bar to encourage proper upward rotation of the shoulder blades and avoid lower back arching
Slowly lower the barbell back to chest height in a controlled manner before immediately beginning the next repetition
en.name: Landmine Squat and Press

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Ubicate en posición de plancha alta con los brazos extendidos.
Llevá una rodilla hacia el pecho y volvé a extenderla.
Alterná las piernas de forma rápida como si corrieras.
Mantené la cadera baja y el core firme.
Ubicate en posición de plancha alta con los brazos extendidos.
Llevá una rodilla hacia el pecho y volvé a extenderla.
Alterná las piernas de forma rápida como si corrieras.
Mantené la cadera baja y el core firme.
es.name: Escalador

instructions: Get into a high plank with arms extended.
Bring one knee toward your chest and extend it back.
Alternate legs quickly, as if running.
Keep your hips low and core tight.
en.name: Mountain Climber

name: Muscle Up
instructions: Colgate de la barra o anillas con agarre prono.
Tirá de forma explosiva llevando el pecho por encima de la barra.
Rotá las muñecas y empujá hasta extender los brazos sobre la barra.
Bajá de forma controlada a la posición de colgado.
Colgate de la barra o anillas con agarre prono.
Tirá de forma explosiva llevando el pecho por encima de la barra.
Rotá las muñecas y empujá hasta extender los brazos sobre la barra.
Bajá de forma controlada a la posición de colgado.
es.name: Muscle Up

instructions: Grip the rings using a false grip, with the base of your palms on top of the rings. Initiate a pull up by pulling the elbows down to your side, flexing the elbows.

As you reach the top position of the pull-up, pull the rings to your armpits as you roll your shoulders forward, allowing your elbows to move straight back behind you. This puts you into the proper position to continue into the dip portion of the movement.
Maintaining control and stability, extend through the elbow to complete the motion.
Use care when lowering yourself to the ground.
en.name: Muscle Up

name: Overhead Squat
instructions: Sostené la barra por encima de la cabeza con un agarre amplio y los brazos extendidos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la barra arriba y el torso erguido.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir sin bajar la barra.
Sostené la barra por encima de la cabeza con un agarre amplio y los brazos extendidos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la barra arriba y el torso erguido.
Descendé hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al piso.
Empujá con los talones para volver a subir sin bajar la barra.
es.name: Sentadilla Overhead

instructions: Start out by having a barbell in front of you on the floor. Your feet should be wider than shoulder width apart from each other.

Bend the knees and use a pronated grip (palms facing you) to grab the barbell. Your hands should be at a wider than shoulder width apart from each other before lifting. Once you are positioned, lift the barbell up until you can rest it on your chest.

Move the barbell over and slightly behind your head and make sure your arms are fully extended. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. Retract your shoulder blades. This is your starting position.

Slowly lower the weight by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground while inhaling. Tip: Keep your back straight while performing this exercise to avoid any injuries and your arms should remain extended and over your head at all times.
Now use your feet and legs to help bring the weight back up to the starting position while exhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Overhead Squat

name: Pilates
instructions: Realizá una secuencia de ejercicios de control y fuerza del core.
Coordiná cada movimiento con la respiración.
Mantené la columna alineada y el abdomen activo.
Ejecutá los movimientos de forma lenta y controlada.
Realizá una secuencia de ejercicios de control y fuerza del core.
Coordiná cada movimiento con la respiración.
Mantené la columna alineada y el abdomen activo.
Ejecutá los movimientos de forma lenta y controlada.
es.name: Pilates

instructions: Perform a sequence of core control and strength exercises.
Coordinate each movement with your breathing.
Keep your spine aligned and your abs active.
Execute the movements slowly and under control.
en.name: Pilates

name: Power Clean
instructions: Parate con la barra en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Levantá la barra de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la barra en los hombros en una media sentadilla.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
Parate con la barra en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Levantá la barra de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la barra en los hombros en una media sentadilla.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
es.name: Cargada de Potencia

instructions: Stand with your feet slightly wider than shoulder width apart and toes pointing out slightly.
Squat down and grasp bar with a closed, pronated grip. Your hands should be slightly wider than shoulder width apart outside knees with elbows fully extended.
Place the bar about 1 inch in front of your shins and over the balls of your feet.
Your back should be flat or slightly arched, your chest held up and out and your shoulder blades should be retracted.
Keep your head in a neutral position (in line with vertebral column and not tilted or rotated) with your eyes focused straight ahead. Inhale during this phase.

Lift the bar from the floor by forcefully extending the hips and the knees as you exhale. Tip: The upper torso should maintain the same angle. Do not bend at the waist yet and do not let the hips rise before the shoulders (this would have the effect of pushing the glutes in the air and stretching the hamstrings.
Keep elbows fully extended with the head in a neutral position and the shoulders over the bar.
As the bar raises keep it as close to the shins as possible.
As the bar passes the knees, thrust your hips forward and slightly bend the knees to avoid locking them. Tip: At this point your thighs should be against the bar.
Keep the back flat or slightly arched, elbows fully extended and your head neutral. Tip: You will hold your breath until the next phase.
Inhale and then forcefully and quickly extend your hips and knees and stand on your toes.

Keep the bar as close to your body as possible. Tip: Your back should be flat with the elbows pointed out to the sides and your head in a neutral position. Also, keep your shoulders over the bar and arms straight as long as possible.
When your lower body joints are fully extended, shrug the shoulders upward rapidly without letting the elbows flex yet. Exhale during this portion of the movement.
As the shoulders reach their highest elevation flex your elbows to begin pulling your body under the bar.

Continue to pull the arms as high and as long as possible. Tip: Due to the explosive nature of this phase, your torso will be erect or with an arched back, your head will be tilted back slightly and your feet may lose contact with the floor.
After the lower body has fully extended and the bar reaches near maximal height, pull your body under the bar and rotate the arms around and under the bar.
Simultaneously, flex the hips and knees into a quarter squat position.
Once the arms are under the bar, inhale and then lift your elbows to position the upper arms parallel to the floor. Rack the bar across the front of your collar bones and front shoulder muscles.
Catch the bar with an erect and tight torso, a neutral head position and flat feet. Exhale during this movement.
Stand up by extending the hips and knees to a fully erect position.
Lower the bar by gradually reducing the muscular tension of the arms to allow a controlled descent of the bar to the thighs. Inhale during this movement.
Simultaneously flex the hips and knees to cushion the impact of the bar on the thighs.
Squat down with the elbows fully extended until the bar touches the floor.
Start over at Phase 1 and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
en.name: Power Clean

name: Power Snatch
instructions: Parate con la barra en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Levantá la barra de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la barra por encima de la cabeza en una media sentadilla.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
Parate con la barra en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Levantá la barra de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la barra por encima de la cabeza en una media sentadilla.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
es.name: Arranque de Potencia

instructions: Begin with a loaded barbell on the floor. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The back angle should stay the same until the bar passes the knees.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, a slightly wider position, pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The bar should be received in a partial squat. Continue raising the bar to the overhead position, receiving the bar locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position with the weight over head.
en.name: Power Snatch

name: Press Under
instructions: Parate con la barra o mancuernas a la altura de los hombros.
Flexioná rápidamente las rodillas dejándote caer bajo la carga.
Recibí la carga con los brazos extendidos por encima de la cabeza.
Incorporate extendiendo las piernas y bajá con control.
Parate con la barra o mancuernas a la altura de los hombros.
Flexioná rápidamente las rodillas dejándote caer bajo la carga.
Recibí la carga con los brazos extendidos por encima de la cabeza.
Incorporate extendiendo las piernas y bajá con control.
es.name: Press Under

instructions: Stand with the bar or dumbbells at shoulder height.
Quickly bend your knees, dropping under the load.
Receive the load with your arms extended overhead.
Stand up by extending your legs and lower with control.
en.name: Press Under

name: Sled Push
instructions: Ubicate detrás del trineo con los brazos extendidos y el cuerpo inclinado hacia adelante.
Empujá el trineo con fuerza dando pasos firmes.
Mantené el core firme y la espalda recta.
Avanzá la distancia indicada manteniendo el impulso.
Ubicate detrás del trineo con los brazos extendidos y el cuerpo inclinado hacia adelante.
Empujá el trineo con fuerza dando pasos firmes.
Mantené el core firme y la espalda recta.
Avanzá la distancia indicada manteniendo el impulso.
es.name: Empuje de Trineo

instructions: Load your pushing sled with the desired weight.

Take an athletic posture, leaning into the sled with your arms fully extended, grasping the handles. Push the sled as fast as possible, focusing on extending your hips and knees to strengthen your posterior chain.
en.name: Sled Push

name: Snatch
instructions: Parate con la barra en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Levantá la barra de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la barra por encima de la cabeza en sentadilla profunda.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
Parate con la barra en el piso y la cadera flexionada, espalda recta.
Levantá la barra de forma explosiva extendiendo cadera y rodillas.
Recibí la barra por encima de la cabeza en sentadilla profunda.
Incorporate y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
es.name: Arranque

instructions: Place your feet at a shoulder width stance with the barbell resting right above the connection between the toes and the rest of the foot.

With a palms facing down grip, bend at the knees and keeping the back flat grab the bar using a wider than shoulder width grip. Bring the hips down and make sure that your body drops as if you were going to sit on a chair. This will be your starting position.
Start pushing the floor as if it were a moving platform with your feet and simultaneously start lifting the barbell keeping it close to your legs.
As the bar reaches the middle of your thighs, push the floor with your legs and lift your body to a complete extension in an explosive motion.
Lift your shoulders back in a shrugging movement as you bring the bar up while lifting your elbows out to the side and keeping them above the bar for as long as possible.

Now in a very quick but powerful motion, you have to get your body under the barbell when it has reached a high enough point where it can be controlled and drop while locking your arms and holding the barbell overhead as you assume a squat position.
Finalize the movement by rising up out of the squat position to finish the lift. At the end of the lift both feet should be on line and the arms fully extended holding the barbell overhead.
en.name: Snatch

name: Split Jerk
instructions: Parate con la barra apoyada en los hombros.
Flexioná levemente las rodillas e impulsá la barra hacia arriba.
Recibí la barra con los brazos extendidos abriendo las piernas en tijera.
Juntá los pies y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
Parate con la barra apoyada en los hombros.
Flexioná levemente las rodillas e impulsá la barra hacia arriba.
Recibí la barra con los brazos extendidos abriendo las piernas en tijera.
Juntá los pies y bajá la barra de forma controlada.
es.name: Envión en Tijera

instructions: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward.

Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders. At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible.

In the brief moment the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete's effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should be moved to a split stance, one foot forward, one foot back, with the knees partially bent. Receive the bar with the arms locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position, bringing the feet together.
en.name: Split Jerk

name: Squat Row
instructions: Parate frente a una polea baja sosteniendo el agarre con ambas manos y los brazos extendidos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Al subir, tirá del agarre hacia el abdomen en un remo.
Volvé a extender los brazos y bajar en sentadilla de forma coordinada.
Parate frente a una polea baja sosteniendo el agarre con ambas manos y los brazos extendidos.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo la espalda recta.
Al subir, tirá del agarre hacia el abdomen en un remo.
Volvé a extender los brazos y bajar en sentadilla de forma coordinada.
es.name: Sentadilla con Remo

instructions: Stand facing a low pulley holding the handle with both hands and arms extended.
Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight.
As you rise, pull the handle toward your abdomen in a row.
Extend your arms and lower into a squat again in a coordinated way.
en.name: Squat Row

name: Thruster (Barbell)
instructions: Parate con la barra apoyada en la parte alta del pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Al subir, empujá la barra por encima de la cabeza en un solo movimiento.
Bajá la barra al pecho y encadená la siguiente repetición.
Parate con la barra apoyada en la parte alta del pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Al subir, empujá la barra por encima de la cabeza en un solo movimiento.
Bajá la barra al pecho y encadená la siguiente repetición.
es.name: Thruster (Barra)

instructions: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders. Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so. This will be your starting position.
Begin to squat by flexing your hips and knees, lowering your hips between your legs. Maintain an upright, straight back as you descend as low as you can.

At the bottom, reverse direction and squat by extending your knees and hips, driving through your heels. As you do so, press both kettlebells overhead by extending your arms straight up, using the momentum from the squat to help drive the weights upward.
As you begin the next repetition, return the weights to the shoulders.
en.name: Thruster (Barbell)

name: Thruster (Kettlebell)
instructions: Parate con una pesa rusa en cada mano a la altura de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Al subir, empujá las pesas por encima de la cabeza.
Bajá las pesas a los hombros y encadená la siguiente repetición.
Parate con una pesa rusa en cada mano a la altura de los hombros.
Bajá en sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido.
Al subir, empujá las pesas por encima de la cabeza.
Bajá las pesas a los hombros y encadená la siguiente repetición.
es.name: Thruster (Kettlebell)

instructions: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders. Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so. This will be your starting position.
Begin to squat by flexing your hips and knees, lowering your hips between your legs. Maintain an upright, straight back as you descend as low as you can.

At the bottom, reverse direction and squat by extending your knees and hips, driving through your heels. As you do so, press both kettlebells overhead by extending your arms straight up, using the momentum from the squat to help drive the weights upward.
As you begin the next repetition, return the weights to the shoulders.
en.name: Thruster (Kettlebell)

name: Wall Ball
instructions: Parate frente a una pared sosteniendo un balón medicinal a la altura del pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla y, al subir, lanzá el balón hacia arriba contra la pared.
Recibí el balón con los brazos y encadená la siguiente sentadilla.
Mantené el ritmo y el control durante las repeticiones.
Parate frente a una pared sosteniendo un balón medicinal a la altura del pecho.
Bajá en sentadilla y, al subir, lanzá el balón hacia arriba contra la pared.
Recibí el balón con los brazos y encadená la siguiente sentadilla.
Mantené el ritmo y el control durante las repeticiones.
es.name: Wall Ball

instructions: Stand facing a wall holding a medicine ball at chest height.
Lower into a squat and, as you rise, throw the ball up against the wall.
Catch the ball with your arms and chain the next squat.
Keep the rhythm and control through the reps.
en.name: Wall Ball

name: Warm Up
instructions: Realizá movimientos articulares suaves de todo el cuerpo.
Aumentá gradualmente la intensidad con movilidad dinámica.
Elevá progresivamente la frecuencia cardíaca.
Preparate para el entrenamiento activando los músculos principales.
Realizá movimientos articulares suaves de todo el cuerpo.
Aumentá gradualmente la intensidad con movilidad dinámica.
Elevá progresivamente la frecuencia cardíaca.
Preparate para el entrenamiento activando los músculos principales.
es.name: Entrada en Calor

instructions: Perform gentle mobility movements for the whole body.
Gradually increase intensity with dynamic mobility.
Progressively raise your heart rate.
Prepare for training by activating the main muscles.
en.name: Warm Up

name: Yoga
instructions: Realizá una secuencia de posturas manteniendo cada una durante varias respiraciones.
Coordiná el movimiento con la respiración.
Mantené la alineación y el equilibrio en cada postura.
Movete de forma fluida y controlada entre posturas.
Realizá una secuencia de posturas manteniendo cada una durante varias respiraciones.
Coordiná el movimiento con la respiración.
Mantené la alineación y el equilibrio en cada postura.
Movete de forma fluida y controlada entre posturas.
es.name: Yoga

instructions: Perform a sequence of poses, holding each for several breaths.
Coordinate your movement with your breathing.
Keep alignment and balance in each pose.
Move fluidly and under control between poses.
en.name: Yoga
